message:
test(conformance): expand nn_state fixture coverage with register, export, and load edge cases

Add comprehensive conformance test cases for the nn.Module state
management subsystem (P2C-008):

Registration validation:
- register_buffer_accepts_valid_nested_name: valid dotted key path
- register_parameter_rejects_double_dot_segment: malformed ".." path
- register_buffer_rejects_trailing_dot_name: trailing dot rejection

State export/import:
- state_export_dedupes_duplicate_parameter_keys: deduplication
- Additional load_state_dict cases with strict/non-strict modes

Each case specifies strict/hardened expected outcomes, contract IDs
(MODULE-REGISTER-001, MODULE-ADVERSARIAL-009, etc.), and E2E scenario
references for the deterministic conformance harness.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>

files.patch:
@@ -235,6 +235,584 @@
         "ft_p2c_008/nn_state/strict:adversarial_state_payload",
         "ft_p2c_008/nn_state/hardened:adversarial_state_payload"
       ]
+    },
+    {
+      "name": "register_buffer_accepts_valid_nested_name",
+      "operation": "register_buffer",
+      "module_path": "root.encoder",
+      "state_key": "encoder_block_0.running_mean",
+      "state_key_kind": "buffer",
+      "strict": {
+        "expect_pass": true,
+        "expected_reason_code": "nn_state_register_ok"
+      },
+      "hardened": {
+        "expect_pass": true,
+        "expected_reason_code": "nn_state_register_ok"
+      },
+      "contract_ids": ["MODULE-REGISTER-001"],
+      "e2e_scenarios": [
+        "ft_p2c_008/nn_state/strict:register_buffer_valid",
+        "ft_p2c_008/nn_state/hardened:register_buffer_valid"
+      ]
+    },
+    {
+      "name": "register_parameter_rejects_double_dot_segment",
+      "operation": "register_parameter",
+      "module_path": "root",
+      "state_key": "encoder..weight",
+      "state_key_kind": "parameter",
+      "strict": {
+        "expect_pass": false,
+        "expected_reason_code": "nn_state_register_rejected"
+      },
+      "hardened": {
+        "expect_pass": false,
+        "expected_reason_code": "nn_state_register_rejected"
+      },
+      "contract_ids": ["MODULE-REGISTER-001", "MODULE-ADVERSARIAL-009"],
+      "e2e_scenarios": [
+        "ft_p2c_008/nn_state/strict:register_invalid_double_dot",
+        "ft_p2c_008/nn_state/hardened:register_invalid_double_dot"
+      ]
+    },
+    {
+      "name": "register_buffer_rejects_trailing_dot_name",
+      "operation": "register_buffer",
+      "module_path": "root",
+      "state_key": "running_var.",
+      "state_key_kind": "buffer",
+      "strict": {
+        "expect_pass": false,
+        "expected_reason_code": "nn_state_register_rejected"
+      },
+      "hardened": {
+        "expect_pass": false,
+        "expected_reason_code": "nn_state_register_rejected"
+      },
+      "contract_ids": ["MODULE-REGISTER-001", "MODULE-ADVERSARIAL-009"],
+      "e2e_scenarios": [
+        "ft_p2c_008/nn_state/strict:register_invalid_trailing_dot",
+        "ft_p2c_008/nn_state/hardened:register_invalid_trailing_dot"
+      ]
+    },
+    {
+      "name": "state_export_dedupes_duplicate_parameter_keys",
+      "operation": "state_export",
+      "module_path": "root.block",
+      "state_key_kind": "state_dict",
+      "parameter_keys": [

+        "encoder.weight",
+        "decoder.weight"
+      ],
+      "persistent_buffer_keys": [

+      ],
+      "non_persistent_buffer_keys": [
+        "encoder.tmp",
+        "encoder.tmp"
+      ],
+      "expected_state_keys": [

+        "encoder.running_mean",
+        "encoder.weight"
+      ],
+      "strict": {
+        "expect_pass": true,
+        "expected_reason_code": "nn_state_state_export_ok"
+      },
+      "hardened": {
+        "expect_pass": true,
+        "expected_reason_code": "nn_state_state_export_ok"
+      },
+      "contract_ids": ["MODULE-STATE-002"],
+      "e2e_scenarios": [

+      ]
+    },

+      "name": "state_export_ignores_non_persistent_buffers",

+      ],

+      "non_persistent_buffer_keys": [

+      ],
+      "expected_state_keys": [

+      ],
+      "strict": {
+        "expect_pass": true,
+        "expected_reason_code": "nn_state_state_export_ok"
+      },
+      "hardened": {
+        "expect_pass": true,
+        "expected_reason_code": "nn_state_state_export_ok"
+      },
+      "contract_ids": ["MODULE-STATE-002", "MODULE-TRANSFER-008"],
+      "e2e_scenarios": [

+        "ft_p2c_008/nn_state/hardened:state_export_non_persistent_filtered"
+      ]
+    },
+    {
+      "name": "state_export_sorted_keys_across_nested_modules",
+      "operation": "state_export",
+      "module_path": "root.deep",
+      "state_key_kind": "state_dict",

+      ],
+      "persistent_buffer_keys": [

+      "non_persistent_buffer_keys": [
+        "layer1.tmp"
+      ],

+        "layer1.weight",
+        "layer2.bias",
+        "layer2.weight"
+      ],
+      "strict": {
+        "expect_pass": true,
+        "expected_reason_code": "nn_state_state_export_ok"
+      },
+      "hardened": {
+        "expect_pass": true,
+        "expected_reason_code": "nn_state_state_export_ok"
+      },
+      "contract_ids": ["MODULE-STATE-002", "MODULE-TRAVERSAL-003"],

+        "ft_p2c_008/nn_state/hardened:state_export_sorted_nested"
+      ]

+      "name": "mode_transition_default_initial_state_idempotent",

+      "hardened": {
+        "expect_pass": true,

+      },

+      ]
+    },
+    {
+      "name": "mode_transition_multiple_toggles_end_eval",
+      "operation": "mode_transition",
+      "module_path": "root.encoder",
+      "state_key_kind": "training_mode",
+      "initial_training": true,
+      "training_transitions": [

+      ],

+      "strict": {

+        "ft_p2c_008/nn_state/strict:mode_multi_toggle_eval",
+        "ft_p2c_008/nn_state/hardened:mode_multi_toggle_eval"
+      ]
+    },
+    {
+      "name": "load_state_strict_rejects_missing_only",
+      "operation": "load_state",
+      "module_path": "root",
+      "state_key_kind": "state_dict",
+      "missing_keys": [
+        "encoder.layer0.weight"
+      ],
+      "strict": {
+        "expect_pass": false,

+        "ft_p2c_008/nn_state/hardened:prefix_dedupe_after_strip"
+      ]
+    },

+      "name": "hook_trace_detects_out_of_order_sequence",

+      "state_key_kind": "hook_trace",

+      "contract_ids": ["MODULE-HOOKS-007"],
+      "e2e_scenarios": [

+        "ft_p2c_008/nn_state/hardened:hook_empty_trace"
+      ]
+    },
+    {
+      "name": "hook_trace_allows_repeated_phases",
+      "operation": "hook_trace",
+      "module_path": "root",
+      "state_key_kind": "hook_trace",
+      "hook_trace": [
+        "state_dict_pre_hook",
+        "state_dict_post_hook",
+        "state_dict_post_hook",
+        "load_pre_hook",
+        "load_post_hook"
+      ],
+      "expected_hook_trace": [
+        "state_dict_pre_hook",
+        "state_dict_post_hook",
+        "state_dict_post_hook",
+        "load_pre_hook",
+        "load_post_hook"
+      ],
+      "strict": {
+        "expect_pass": true,

+      },
+      "hardened": {
+        "expect_pass": true,
+        "expected_reason_code": "nn_state_hook_trace_ok"
+      },
+      "contract_ids": ["MODULE-HOOKS-007"],
+      "e2e_scenarios": [
+        "ft_p2c_008/nn_state/strict:hook_repeated_phases",
+        "ft_p2c_008/nn_state/hardened:hook_repeated_phases"
+      ]
+    },
+    {
+      "name": "register_parameter_accepts_numeric_segment",
+      "operation": "register_parameter",
+      "module_path": "root.seq",
+      "state_key": "layers.0.weight",
+      "state_key_kind": "parameter",
+      "strict": {
+        "expect_pass": true,
+        "expected_reason_code": "nn_state_register_ok"
+      },
+      "hardened": {
+        "expect_pass": true,
+        "expected_reason_code": "nn_state_register_ok"
+      },
+      "contract_ids": ["MODULE-REGISTER-001", "MODULE-TRAVERSAL-003"],
+      "e2e_scenarios": [
+        "ft_p2c_008/nn_state/strict:register_numeric_segment",
+        "ft_p2c_008/nn_state/hardened:register_numeric_segment"
+      ]
+    },
+    {
+      "name": "load_state_missing_unexpected_with_assign_flag_split",
+      "operation": "load_state",
+      "module_path": "root",
+      "state_key_kind": "assign",
+      "assign_flag": true,
+      "missing_keys": [
+        "trunk.weight"
+      ],
+      "unexpected_keys": [
+        "aux.bias"
+      ],
+      "strict": {
+        "expect_pass": false,
+        "expected_reason_code": "nn_state_load_missing_or_unexpected_rejected"
+      },
+      "hardened": {
+        "expect_pass": true,
+        "expected_reason_code": "nn_state_load_hardened_allowlisted"
+      },
+      "contract_ids": ["MODULE-LOAD-STRICT-005", "MODULE-TRANSFER-008"],
+      "e2e_scenarios": [
+        "ft_p2c_008/nn_state/strict:load_assign_missing_unexpected",
+        "ft_p2c_008/nn_state/hardened:load_assign_missing_unexpected"
+      ]
+    },
+    {
+      "name": "state_export_handles_empty_payload",
+      "operation": "state_export",
+      "module_path": "root.empty",
+      "state_key_kind": "state_dict",
+      "parameter_keys": [],

+      "non_persistent_buffer_keys": [

+      ],

+      "strict": {
+        "expect_pass": true,

+      "hardened": {

+      },
+      "contract_ids": ["MODULE-STATE-002"],
+      "e2e_scenarios": [
+        "ft_p2c_008/nn_state/strict:state_export_empty_payload",
+        "ft_p2c_008/nn_state/hardened:state_export_empty_payload"
+      ]
     }
   ]
 }
